slash_commands.name: help
slash_commands.description: Show available slash commands and usage.

slash_commands.name: status
slash_commands.description: Show noodle status, active config, plugins, and permissions.

slash_commands.name: reload
slash_commands.description: Reload noodle runtime config in the current shell.

slash_commands.name: config
slash_commands.description: Inspect or update noodle config from the terminal.

slash_commands.name: update
slash_commands.description: Update noodle in place using the installed updater or GitHub archive bootstrap.

slash_commands.name: uninstall
slash_commands.description: Uninstall noodle after an interactive confirmation prompt.
